caption: A woman with black hair and glasses is speaking against a plain dark background. She is wearing a light green tunic with intricate reddish-brown embroidery around the neckline and a dark beaded necklace. A small lavalier microphone is clipped to the front of her garment. Throughout the sequence, she speaks with a neutral expression, gesturing with both hands to emphasize her points. Her hands move from a slightly open position in front of her chest to a wider gesture, then back toward her center. In the bottom-left corner of each scene, a circular logo and the text "NPTEL" are visible. The lighting remains consistent, focusing on the woman, while the background remains a solid dark void without any other people or objects.
